creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-30 22:19:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Config-Properties Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Config::Properties is a near implementation of the java.util.Properties API.
  It is designed to allow easy reading, writing and manipulation of Java-style
  property files.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Config-Properties/
  
  PR:             ports/107289
  Submitted by:   Craig Manley <cmanley@xs4all.nl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2568    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/p5-Config-Properties/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-Properties/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-Properties/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-Properties/pkg-plist (new)
